form.formComment: Is a four start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when third (18.59) over 320m at this track. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Last start was on debut when she finished 7th in a Maiden on April 15 over 320m at this track behind Creeping Choice beaten 11 lengths (19.09). Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

form.formComment: Has raced four times and is overdue for a win, the latest offering a third (18.91) over 320m at this track. In the money at the last two runs. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 320m (18.47) beating Midnight Kelly in Maiden on April 15. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 320m (18.47) beating Midnight Kelly in Maiden on April 15. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Has ability but remains a maiden after three starts, the most recent effort a fifth (18.71) over 320m at this track. Will struggle.

form.formComment: Debutant by Feral Franky from Ritza Vonnie. Trained by Addam Harper. Keep a close eye on the market.

form.formComment: Yet to break through in seven starts but has run a number of minor placings. Not showing a great deal of early speed. The form from the last run stacks up nicely. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Turned in a sound debut over 320m at this track where he was well back early but wound up strongly to finish third (18.76) and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has the ability to be in the finish.
